accountIdentifier.description: The masked IBAN or bank account number.

id.description: The unique identifier of the resource.

realLastFour.description: Four last digits of the bank account number. If the transfer instrument is created using [instant bank account verification](https://docs.adyen.com/release-notes/platforms-and-financial-products#releaseNote=2023-05-08-hosted-onboarding), and it is a virtual bank account, these digits may be different from the last four digits of the masked account number.

trustedSource.description: Identifies if the bank account was created through [instant bank verification](https://docs.adyen.com/release-notes/platforms-and-financial-products#releaseNote=2023-05-08-hosted-onboarding).
